description: User uploads a resume PDF and it appears in documents list as primary

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login and log in with qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com / HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9
Note the current number of documents listed (may be 0)

Click the Upload button. Report what the upload flow looks like (button label, modal or inline, accepted file types shown). If a file input opens, note whether it accepts PDF and DOCX. Do NOT actually upload a file — just verify the upload CTA and flow are present and functional
Verify: is the Upload button visible? Is the empty state (if no documents) meaningful — does it explain what to upload? Check browser console for JS errors
Report: describe exactly what you see on the documents page. Is the Upload button visible? Is there a file type hint (PDF / DOCX, max 5MB)? Screenshot and describe.

description: User adds a job portal scanning config and then deletes it — full create/delete lifecycle

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login and log in with qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com / HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9
Click the '+ Add Portal' button to open the add portal form
Fill in the form: portal_name = 'qa-test-portal', search_keywords = 'software engineer', preferred_locations = 'Bangalore', set scan_time to any available option. Submit the form.
Verify: the form submits without a 500 error. Does the new portal 'qa-test-portal' appear in the portals list?
If the portal was created: find the delete button for 'qa-test-portal' and delete it. Confirm the deletion. Verify it is removed from the list.
Report: did the full create then list then delete lifecycle work? What errors appeared, if any? Screenshot at each step.
